title: Add dashboard panels for loaded templates and compile failures
summary: Add dashboard panels for loaded templates and compile failures
acceptanceCriteria: Templates can be discovered from Hermes template registry paths.
Template validation exposes diagnostics with source context where available.
Template metadata supports compatibility and dashboard reporting.
reviewNotes: Implemented in the Hermes OS native command, task-generation, dashboard, persistence, scheduled review, runtime policy, template registry, and execution-readiness work already recorded in docs/hermes-os-integration-log.md.
